introSection:
Flight of the Wicked Witch is a steel suspended roller coaster currently located at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. It is situated within the Wizard of Oz themed area. It was built by Vekoma, and is their 453m model of Suspended Family Coaster, first used on Orkanen.

The coaster's theme is based on the scene where Dorothy is kidnapped by flying monkeys. Riders first enter the gates of the Emerald City. Inside is the floating head of the Wizard of Oz, and the ride entrances for Flight of the Wicked Witch and Kansas Twister. The queueline begins in a field of poisoned flowers, and continues into a dark forest. The queue ends in the witch's castle; riders board the train and begin the ride.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The name of the ride was announced in February 2024.

The ride opened on 20 December 2024.

fullText:
Flight of the Wicked Witch is a steel suspended roller coaster currently located at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. It is situated within the Wizard of Oz themed area. It was built by Vekoma, and is their 453m model of Suspended Family Coaster, first used on Orkanen.

The coaster's theme is based on the scene where Dorothy is kidnapped by flying monkeys. Riders first enter the gates of the Emerald City. Inside is the floating head of the Wizard of Oz, and the ride entrances for Flight of the Wicked Witch and Kansas Twister. The queueline begins in a field of poisoned flowers, and continues into a dark forest. The queue ends in the witch's castle; riders board the train and begin the ride.

The name of the ride was announced in February 2024.

The ride opened on 20 December 2024.
